turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, I want to know if you have a dedicated TPA helpdesk at the clinic.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, we do have a dedicated insurance and TPA helpdesk at Sunrise Multispeciality Clinic.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: And what are their working hours?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: The insurance desk is operational Monday to Saturday from 9 AM to 5 PM. For emergencies after hours, the admissions team can assist with basic insurance coordination.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Can they help with pre-authorisation for a planned surgery?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Absolutely. Our TPA team handles all pre-authorisation requests, including gathering documents, submitting them to your insurer, and following up. It's advisable to come in 2-3 days before your procedure.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Very helpful. I'll come by Monday.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: We'll be happy to assist. See you Monday!
